x4freetext: The electrostatic accelerator was used.
A gas target of 99.5% purity was used. The target
pressure was typically 20 Torr.
Estimated error in the absolute
cross section
Uncertainty in the relative cross section
SD: Corrections in all Subents.
The accuracy of data presentation was revised.
ERR-S -> ERR-1.
Neutrons were detected by a plastic scintillator
coupled to a 56 AVP photomultiplier. The detector could
be set at any angle from 0 to 150 degr.
